description: Receipt in the hand of Abu Zikri Kohen: saḥḥa lil-shaykh Abū l-Surūr dirham wa-niṣf la-ghayr. Old IB: 229f. There is a line or two in Arabic script on verso in a fiscal hand, probably part of a tax receipt (cf. also ENA 3971.13–24, 31, 33, 34).
tags: IB5, tax, Arabic script, tax receipt, India
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
